_meta.purpose: Which models the mChatAI Cloud (compute-token) provider exposes. sourceProviders = providers resold WHOLESALE (every active model, x markup). autoExpose = POLICY-based auto-surfacing of OpenRouter chat models — no hand-maintained list; mirrors upstream and filters at the picker, so new OpenRouter models appear on Cloud automatically. curatedOpenRouter = explicit override slugs to ALSO surface (belt-and-suspenders for brand-new models not yet in the weekly catalog mirror). Read by macOS CloudProvider.computedMchataiCloudModels() via MchataisourceCacheService. Edit + git push + refreshMchataisourceCache ships with no app rebuild (RULE #1).
_meta.fallback: binary carries [anthropic,openai,google,perplexity] + [] curatedOpenRouter + autoExpose.enabled=false as _fallback_only defaults (offline first-launch is byte-identical to pre-autoExpose)
_meta.server_note: The compute-proxy ACCEPT side is gated separately by env (billing is safe either way — passthrough cost is read from OpenRouter's usage.cost + markup, 0% drift): set PAID_PASSTHROUGH_AUTO=true so the proxy accepts ANY OpenRouter passthrough slug (optionally minus PAID_PASSTHROUGH_DENYLIST). PAID_PASSTHROUGH_ALLOWLIST remains as a narrow always-allow override. Known CHAT_MODELS still take the direct-provider path; only unknown OR-shaped slugs use passthrough. Do NOT set OPENROUTER_ENABLED=true for this — that reroutes known models off their direct APIs.
